title: Australian Beef and Tomato Pie
description: A hearty beef and tomato pie, inspired by Australian flavors, perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: Peel and chop the onion, sauté in a pan until softened.
Add the beef to the pan and cook until browned, breaking into small pieces.
Add the peppercorns and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Roll out the pie crust and fill with the beef mixture.
Place the pie in the oven and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let the pie rest for 10 minutes before serving.
